Interface UsesAmmo

All Known Implementing Classes:
Archer, Bubble, Exorcist, Mage, RangedClass
public interface UsesAmmo
Contract for characters that use an ammo/reload shooting model.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    canShoot()
    Checks whether a shot can be fired.
    void
    consumeAmmo()
    Consumes one ammo unit for a successful shot.
    int
    getCurrentAmmo()
    Returns current ammo count.
    int
    getMaxAmmo()
    Returns maximum ammo capacity.
    boolean
    isReloading()
    Returns whether reload is in progress.
    void
    reload()
    Starts reload behavior.
    void
    updateAmmo()
    Updates reload/shooting timers each frame.

  • Method Details

    • reload

      void reload()
      Starts reload behavior.

    • updateAmmo

      void updateAmmo()
      Updates reload/shooting timers each frame.

    • canShoot

      boolean canShoot()
      Checks whether a shot can be fired.
      Returns:
      true when shooting is currently allowed

    • consumeAmmo

      void consumeAmmo()
      Consumes one ammo unit for a successful shot.

    • getCurrentAmmo

      int getCurrentAmmo()
      Returns current ammo count.
      Returns:
      current ammo

    • getMaxAmmo

      int getMaxAmmo()
      Returns maximum ammo capacity.
      Returns:
      max ammo

    • isReloading

      boolean isReloading()
      Returns whether reload is in progress.
      Returns:
      true while reloading
